title: push_subscription_set omits accountId from request — RFC 8620 §7.2 conformance
description: The method correctly reads api_url directly from session.api_url without calling session_parts() (which would try to extract accountId and would fail for PushSubscription objects that are not account-scoped). This is the right structural choice. A future contributor might try to refactor it to use session_parts() 'for consistency' — that would break RFC 8620 §7.2 compliance by injecting an accountId.
